Sub-series — NHC ratings chain across the block boundary

SWNHC2015 progressive handicap; blocks scored independently per RRS Appendix A

Scoring system: NHC · Discards: No discards. 
17 and 11 tie on 6; A8.1 (best scores first) puts Oona's race win ahead.
        7 and 22 tie on 12; A8.1 favours Aura's 2nd in race 1.
